name: contextweave
description: Proactive ambient context engine — surfaces relevant code before you ask

contextweave.daemonPort.description: Port the ContextWeave daemon listens on

contextweave.daemonHost.description: Host the ContextWeave daemon listens on

contextweave.enabled.description: Enable or disable ContextWeave file watching

contextweave.languages.description: Language IDs to watch and ingest

contextweave.maxContextTokens.description: Maximum total tokens to include in context output

contextweave.autoOpenPanel.description: Automatically open the context panel when stuck is detected

contextweave.debounceMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds for the save listener
